title: Deliciously Tangy Saudi Arabian Deodeok Root Skewers
description: A tangy and springy Saudi Arabian dish featuring deodeok root, perfect for meal prep and diabetic-friendly diets. This recipe combines the unique flavor of deodeok root with a blend of Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the deodeok root pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated deodeok root pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Flip the skewers and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the deodeok root is tender and lightly browned.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
